student_reviews.pros: Excellent alumni network, strong curriculum with focus on finance/consulting/PE/VC, close-knit atmosphere despite large size, beautiful Sage Hall facility, strong ties to MBB pipeline and IB, supportive professors
Ivy League brand, supportive career center, good for investment banking
student_reviews.cons: Bureaucracy, lack of diversity, passive aggressive racism, limited social scene, high costs

student_reviews.pros: Great for IB and consulting recruiting, strong alumni network, close proximity to NYC, good immersion programs
student_reviews.cons: Academics need improvement, not great for VC/PE/Tech/GM, poor student body diversity

student_reviews.pros: Good for banking and T20 for consulting
student_reviews.cons: Under resourced, poorly run administration, weak student quality, uninspiring academics, limited alumni support post-graduation, feels like vocational training
